author.bio: Doctor of evolutionary biology, science YouTuber and presenter.
author.name: Dr Sally Le Page

content.text:
NEW SOFA SCIENCE! @drjoehanson and I chat about going from PhD to YouTube, working with PBS and how to find a story:
https://youtu.be/uJpX2pAXU84
